message:
refactor(core,vdbe): adapt to Arc<str>/Arc<[u8]> in SqliteValue conversions and remove exhaustive literal match arm

Update compat_persist, connection, and codegen modules to work with the
Arc-wrapped string/blob types in SqliteValue:

- Use `&**name` / `&*path` dereference patterns instead of `.as_str()`
  for Arc<str> field access in compat_persist and connection
- Call `.to_string()` / `.to_vec()` when converting Arc<str>/Arc<[u8]>
  to owned String/Vec<u8> for Literal construction and schema fields
- Add `.into()` calls where String needs conversion to Arc<str> for
  SqliteValue::Text construction (checkpoint_schedule, fk_action)
- Remove unreachable wildcard match arm in JOIN codegen emit_join_expr
  now that all Literal variants are covered

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
